Flow.description: This is a Screen Flow. This flow is used to create a work order estimation, including asset details, service contracts, warranties, and products required.
Flow.label: SDO SFS WOE

fields.name: SelectDate
fields.fieldText: Would you like to create the Work Order for this Quote then please select the Start Date for Work Order

fields.name: SuccessMsg
fields.fieldText: Success! Work Order "{!Fetch_Work_Order.WorkOrderNumber}" has been created for Quote "{!Quote_Name}" was approved.
